children.text: a facility of the Department of Defense;
a facility of the George P. Shultz National Foreign Affairs Training Center established under section 701(a) of the Foreign Service Act of 1980 (); or22 U.S.C. 4021(a)

children.label: b
children.text: In this section, the term “dependent” has the same meaning that it has under .section 401 of title 37
